variables.notes: An explicit SG&A row exists: 'Sales and Administration Expenses'. Because it appears unavailable in 2025 but populated in earlier years, included it plus overhead component rows 'Employee benefits expense' and 'Other operating expenses' per the SG&A hierarchy. Excluded 'Operating expense' because it is a total/subtotal. Excluded R&D supplemental from XSGA because it appears only below operating profit as supplemental disclosure.
